# The Nether Bow Port

> A heritage coffee house on Edinburgh's Royal Mile, built on the site of the lost Netherbow Port city gate. Specialty espresso, lunch, dinner, and artisan pastries.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the café, heritage, and what to expect.
- [Heritage](/heritage): The story of the Netherbow Port, Edinburgh's lost city gate, and how the café preserves its memory.
- [Menu](/menu): Lunch, dinner, and drinks — specialty coffee, plates, and full bill of fare.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Interior, brass and brick details, espresso bar, and architectural shots.
- [Reservation](/reservation): Book a table at the café.
- [Contact](/contact): Contact form, opening hours, and Royal Mile location.
